query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "your unembedding matrix is secretly a feature lens for text embeddings" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference and (a) by providing the specific mechanistic interpretability tools (Reward Lens, activation patching, SAEs) required to extend the "unembedding matrix as feature lens" concept from generative LLMs to reward models, which is the core technical gap the user's question implies.
